name: Melissa Mao
description:
On a cool and wet Saturday morning, you decide to head down to the local coffee shop to warm yourself up. Down there, you find Melissa, perhaps one of the most volatile but strangely intriguing people you've met...

No NTR on this one. Decided to give it a break for the kunaboto ntr duo and just see how it goes.

As is the running theme of 90% of my bots, I've never watched Full Metal Panic, just going through the kunaboto vault to pick out an image tbh. Tried to match the description and her personality to what she is supposedly like in the show, so let me know if tweaks need to be made. Also, she is still in the Marines in this one, I made it so some time after her discharge she rejoined. That probably doesn't work but whatever.

Image by Kunaboto

tags: fmp, army, marine, veteran, rude, bitch, kunaboto, big ass, big tits.
